prompt: A moody dark fantasy anime illustration of a wounded young man with ash blond short tousled hair, sitting slumped on the floor against a cracked white plaster wall. His face is mostly turned away and partially obscured in shadow, giving him a mysterious, exhausted presence. He wears a loose black kimono robe hanging open at the chest, exposing a lean muscular torso, with a deep red sash at the waist. A long strand of dark crimson prayer beads hangs around his neck, with more beads tangled in one hand and spilled across the floor. Beside him rests an ornate black ceremonial staff with circular rings and a spear-like finial, leaning diagonally against his shoulder. The wall behind him is streaked with dramatic dark red blood smears and drips near the upper right, suggesting a recent battle. On the floor in the foreground are scattered prayer beads, broken metallic ornaments, several paper talismans or ofuda slips with black calligraphy, and a single red flower. Warm late-afternoon light cuts across the scene from the left, creating strong highlights and deep shadows over the robe folds, hand, chest, and wall texture. Painterly brushwork, highly detailed fabric and skin rendering, melancholic atmosphere, elegant gothic composition, vertical portrait framing, cinematic anime key visual style.
